ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Replaces the default code block rendering with VS Code-quality syntax highlighting. Works in both reading view and editor (live preview / source mode).
ast.target: 使用 VS Code 级别的语法高亮替换默认的代码块渲染。在阅读视图和编辑器（实时预览/源码模式）中均有效。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Absolute paths to files sourced before Bash, Zsh, and Shell blocks run, one per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.
ast.target: 在 Bash、Zsh 和 Shell 代码块运行前加载的文件的绝对路径，每行一个。以 # 开头的行将被忽略。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Additional environment variables passed to executed code (one KEY=VALUE per line). Useful for PYTHONPATH, API keys, etc.
ast.target: 传递给执行代码的额外环境变量（每行一个 KEY=VALUE）。适用于 PYTHONPATH、API 密钥等。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: using your installed language runtimes. Supported: Python (
ast.target: 使用您已安装的语言运行时。支持：Python（

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: `sh` code blocks now run POSIX sh (/bin/sh) — the same as `shell` blocks. Previously `sh` ran bash.
ast.target: `sh` 代码块现在运行 POSIX sh (/bin/sh) — 与 `shell` 块相同。之前 `sh` 运行的是 bash。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: rename the fence from `sh` to `bash`, or
ast.target: 将代码围栏从 `sh` 重命名为 `bash`，或者

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: set Settings → CodeSuite → Environment → Shell (sh) path to a bash binary (e.g. /opt/homebrew/bin/bash).
ast.target: 在设置 → CodeSuite → 环境 → Shell (sh) 路径中设置为 bash 二进制文件（例如 /opt/homebrew/bin/bash）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used when Obsidian is in dark mode.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 处于暗黑模式时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used when Obsidian is in light mode.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 处于浅色模式时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show line numbers in code blocks (reading view only).
ast.target: 在代码块中显示行号（仅限阅读视图）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the language name in the code block header bar.
ast.target: 在代码块标题栏中显示语言名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow code blocks to extend beyond the normal content width for more horizontal space.
ast.target: 允许代码块超出正常内容宽度，以获得更多水平空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap long lines in reading view instead of showing a horizontal scrollbar, matching the editor's behavior.
ast.target: 在阅读视图中自动换行，而不是显示水平滚动条，与编辑器行为保持一致。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a run button on code blocks for supported languages. Desktop only.
ast.target: 在支持的语言的代码块上显示运行按钮。仅限桌面端。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the 'Clear execution session' button in the note header bar. Disable to declutter the tab bar — the 'Clear execution session for this note' command still works. Desktop only; never shown on mobile.
ast.target: 在笔记标题栏中显示“清除执行会话”按钮。禁用可减少标签栏杂乱 — “清除此笔记的执行会话”命令仍然有效。仅限桌面端；移动端从不显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum seconds before a running process is automatically killed.
ast.target: 运行进程在自动终止前的最大秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directory code executes in. The vault root is recommended so scripts can access vault files with relative paths.
ast.target: 代码执行的目录。推荐使用保险库根目录，这样脚本可以使用相对路径访问保险库文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to use as the working directory for code execution.
ast.target: 用作代码执行工作目录的绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to Python binary or virtualenv (e.g. /path/to/venv/bin/python3). When pointing to a venv, its tools (pip, playwright, etc.) are available to all languages including bash.
ast.target: Python 二进制文件或虚拟环境的绝对路径（例如 /path/to/venv/bin/python3）。当指向虚拟环境时，其工具（pip、playwright 等）对所有语言（包括 bash）均可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path used by `shell` and `sh` code blocks. Defaults to /bin/sh (POSIX sh). Point at /opt/homebrew/bin/bash if you want these blocks to run under modern bash.
ast.target: `shell` 和 `sh` 代码块使用的绝对路径。默认为 /bin/sh（POSIX sh）。如果您希望这些块在现代 bash 下运行，请指向 /opt/homebrew/bin/bash。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run php snippets that omit an opening <?php tag by adding one at execution time. The note text is not changed.
ast.target: 运行省略了开头 <?php 标签的 PHP 代码片段，在执行时自动添加该标签。笔记文本不会被更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run Bash and Zsh executions in login mode so startup files can initialize PATH, aliases, and functions.
ast.target: 以登录模式运行 Bash 和 Zsh 执行，以便启动文件可以初始化 PATH、别名和函数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to a .env file. Variables are loaded into the process environment at execution time. Values from "Extra environment variables" (and frontmatter) override anything declared here, so a shared project .env can be mixed with per-note overrides.
ast.target: 指向 .env 文件的绝对路径。变量在执行时加载到进程环境中。“额外环境变量”（以及 frontmatter）中的值会覆盖此处声明的任何内容，因此共享的项目 .env 可以与每个笔记的覆盖设置混合使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a collapse toggle to inline code blocks in reading view. Click the header to expand/collapse.
ast.target: 在阅读视图中为内联代码块添加折叠切换。点击标题可展开/折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start all inline code blocks collapsed. Reading view only.
ast.target: 默认折叠所有内联代码块。仅限阅读视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Register code file extensions (.py, .js, .sh, etc.) with Obsidian so they appear in the file explorer sidebar and open in CodeSuite's lightweight editor. Requires Obsidian restart to take effect when toggled.
ast.target: 向 Obsidian 注册代码文件扩展名（.py、.js、.sh 等），以便它们出现在文件资源管理器侧边栏中，并在 CodeSuite 的轻量级编辑器中打开。切换时需要重启 Obsidian 才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Expose markdown tables to code as variables. Put a %% codesuite: <name> as <shape> %% directive (shapes: records, dict, columns, matrix, vars) on the line directly above a table, or use a 'var | value' header for a vars table. Off by default — behaviour may change in future releases.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 表格作为变量暴露给代码。在表格正上方的行放置一个 %% codesuite: <name> as <shape> %% 指令（形状：records、dict、columns、matrix、vars），或为 vars 表使用 'var | value' 表头。默认关闭 — 行为可能在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动添加 PHP 开头标签

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 以登录 Shell 运行 bash/zsh

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show code files in the file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示代码文件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `engine` option is required. Use `createOnigurumaEngine` or `createJavaScriptRegexEngine` to create an engine.
ast.target: `engine` 选项是必需的。请使用 `createOnigurumaEngine` 或 `createJavaScriptRegexEngine` 来创建引擎。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Restart Obsidian for this change to take effect.
ast.target: 请重启 Obsidian 以使此更改生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No executable code blocks found. Switch to reading view first.
ast.target: 未找到可执行的代码块。请先切换到阅读视图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Run all stopped: a block exited with an error.
ast.target: 全部运行已停止：一个代码块因错误退出。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All code blocks are currently running.
ast.target: 所有代码块当前正在运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Importing code files is only available on desktop.
ast.target: 导入代码文件仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not read file path from picker. Try again, or report this issue.
ast.target: 无法从选择器读取文件路径。请重试，或报告此问题。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将代码文件导入为别名…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Clear execution session for this note
ast.target: 清除此笔记的执行会话

ast.name: text
ast.source: Heads-up about a behavior change in this update to how shell code blocks are executed.
ast.target: 关于本次更新中 shell 代码块执行方式行为变更的提示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have `sh` blocks that rely on bash features (arrays, [[ ]], etc.), either:
ast.target: 如果你有依赖 bash 特性（数组、[[ ]] 等）的 `sh` 代码块，请选择以下方式之一：
